Growing

Find your people.

Beyond Ferni's core team, a garden of specialized AI coaches awaits. ADHD support, sobriety companions, sleep specialists, parenting guides—experts who understand your specific journey.

Specialized personas Coaches for specific life challenges
Community ratings Real experiences, real reviews
Seamless handoffs Your Ferni team, expanded
Expected arrival Q1 2026

WHAT'S GROWING

Specialized coaches for every journey

Each persona is designed with deep expertise and genuine care for specific life challenges.

E

Eli

ADHD Navigator

Turns overwhelming days into manageable moments. No judgment, just practical strategies that actually work.

Coming Q1 2026
M

Marcus

Sobriety Companion

24/7 support for your recovery journey. Here for the hard moments, celebrating the small wins.

Coming Q1 2026
K

Kenji

Sleep Specialist

Understands why your mind races at 2am. Gentle guidance back to restful nights.

Coming Q1 2026
C

Carmen

Parenting Guide

Because parents need someone too. Practical wisdom for the beautiful chaos of raising tiny humans.

Coming Q1 2026
A

Amara

Grief Companion

Holds space for loss without rushing healing. Your grief is valid. Your pace is right.

Coming Q1 2026
S

Sasha

Creative Catalyst

Helps you past the blank page. Sparks ideas, unblocks creativity, champions your artistic voice.

Coming Q1 2026

Want to know when we bloom?

Be the first to meet your new coaches. We'll notify you the moment the marketplace opens.

No spam, just one email when we're ready. Unsubscribe anytime.

FOR CREATORS

Build what matters

Have unique expertise? Create your own AI coach and help people who need exactly what you offer.
